programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the Scottish Premiership. Here, Rangers and Celtic go head-to-head at Ibrox in a five-goal thriller in March 2018.

programme.title: SPFL 2017/18: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: Relive some classic action from the Scottish Premiership. Here, Celtic meet Rangers at Celtic Park in the 2017-18 season - where three points for the hosts would secure the title.

programme.title: SPFL 18/19: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: Celtic host Rangers at Celtic Park in the SPFL Ladbrokes Premiership. This is new Rangers boss Steven Gerrard's first Old Firm derby.

programme.title: SPFL 18/19: Rangers v Celtic
programme.desc: Rangers take on Celtic at Ibrox in the SPFL Ladbrokes Premiership. A win for Rangers draws them level with the visitors at the top, while a win for Celtic puts them six points clear.

programme.title: SPFL 18/19: Celtic v Rangers
programme.desc: Celtic host rivals Rangers at Celtic Park in the SPFL Ladbrokes Premiership. Celtic can move 13 points clear at the top with a win.

programme.desc: A chance to look back at the highest scoring game of the SPL era. Motherwell and Hibernian meet at Fir Park in May 2010 in a 12-goal thriller.

programme.desc: In the dying embers of an 2018-19 Sky Bet Championship clash at Villa Park, Kemar Roofe's last-gasp goal sealed a famous Leeds comeback having trailed 2-0 to Aston Villa.

programme.title: EFL 18/19: Aston Villa v Sheff Utd
programme.desc: In 2019 at Villa Park, Tyrone Mings, Tammy Abraham and Andre Green saved Villa's blushes, scoring three goals in the final 10 minutes to steal a point from the visiting Sheffield United.

programme.title: ATP Final: Monte Carlo

programme.title: WTA Final: Indian Wells
programme.desc: Mirra Andreeva meets top seed Aryna Sabalenka in the Indian Wells final. Sabalenka avenged her Australian Open defeat to Keys in the semis, while Andreeva dethroned Swiatek. (16.03)

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches
programme.desc: In a match that would decide the 2016 year-end world number one, Andy Murray - looking to cap a storybook season at The O2 in London - met rival Novak Djokovic at the ATP Finals.

programme.title: WTA Final: Adelaide
programme.desc: Mirra Andreeva, the Indian Wells champion, faces Canadian Open winner Victoria Mboko in a teenage showdown for the Adelaide crown. Both are looking to clinch a first WTA 500 title. (17.01)

programme.title: ATP Final: Adelaide
programme.desc: Tomas Machac enters his first final in Adelaide since clinching the Acapulco crown last February as the resurgent Czech plays Ugo Humbert, who seeks his eighth tour-level title. (17.01)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Britain's Katie Boulter competes in her first quarter-final since Nottingham 2025, taking on home hope Linda Fruhvirtová at the Ostrava Open. (05.02)

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Top Transylvania Open seed Emma Raducanu advances to the quarter-finals to face Poland's Maja Chwalinska. The Brit came from 5-0 down in the opening set of her last-16 win. (05.02)

programme.title: Raducanu v Fernandez 2021
programme.desc: Going 10 rounds without dropping a set, Great Britain's Emma Raducanu claimed the women's title at the 2021 US Open, becoming the first-ever qualifier to win a singles Grand Slam.

programme.title: Tennis Highlights
programme.desc: Top Transylvania Open seed Emma Raducanu advances to the quarter-finals to face Poland's Maja Chwalinska. The Brit came from 5-0 down in the opening set of her last-16 win. (05.02)

programme.title: ATP Final: Auckland
programme.desc: Jakub Mensik and Sebastian Baez meet in the Auckland decider. Mensik targets his first title since beating Novak Djokovic in Miami, while Baez eyes his eighth career title. (17.01)

programme.title: ATP/WTA Tour Classic Matches

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Germany '19
programme.desc: The 2019 German Grand Prix from the famous Hockenheimring. Lewis Hamilton starts on pole ahead of Max Verstappen, with Sebastian Vettel back in last place.

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Canada '11
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2011 Canadian Grand Prix. After an earlier collision had all but ruled him out of contention for the chequered flag, Jenson Button would hit back in dramatic fashion.

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Britain '08
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 2008 British Grand Prix from Silverstone. McLaren driver Heikki Kovalainen was the fastest in qualifying, securing his very first Formula 1 pole position.

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Belgium '98
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 1998 Belgian Grand Prix from the Circuit de Spa-Francorchamps. Mika Hakkinen started on pole ahead of British drivers David Coulthard and Damon Hill.

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Brazil '12
programme.desc: A look back at the 2012 Brazilian Grand Prix at the Autodromo Jose Carlos Pace. Sebastian Vettel topped the standings going into this season-ending race.

programme.title: Timeless Triumphs: Pierre Gasly
programme.desc: One of motorsport's most iconic races arrives with the Italian Grand Prix, held at the Autodromo Nazionale Monza. Charles Leclerc was the champion at this race last year.

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Spain '96
programme.desc: A chance to relive the 1996 Spanish Grand Prix from the Circuit de Catalunya. Williams driver Damon Hill led the drivers' championship after the previous race in Monaco.

programme.title: Wet Weekends: Portugal '85
programme.desc: A chance to relive some of Ayrton Senna's most significant and spectacular races. Here is the 1985 Portuguese Grand Prix at the Autodromo do Estoril.

programme.title: Container Wars
programme.desc: Secret of the Orient: The biggest auction on the planet explodes when a mysterious container from the Far East makes landfall in Los Angeles. (S1, ep 7)

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Scout's Honour: Mike kicks off his fifth year in business with the restoration of a rare 1971 International Scout II, before teaming up with his brothers for a family task. (S5, ep 1)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry Cole,Allen Millyard and Guy Willison visit top collector Stuart Imber before preparing to sell their latest finds at the Fairford Steam. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: Henry, Allen and Guy explore a bike specialist's sheds, take a £1200 gamble, and head to an auto jumble. (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: Junk & Disorderly
programme.desc: The vintage restorers return for season four, challenging themselves to make money out of other people's automotive junk and classic collectables. (S4, ep 1)

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Mini Cooper: The team know the BMW Mini is a popular car - but with so many of them around, will it be too difficult to make one that stands out from the crowd? (S3, ep 2)

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Southern Charm: Rick, Corey and Chum head to Savannah and the spirited trio can't help but be enchanted by a magic trick, a spooky hotel and an infamous gravestone. (S1, ep 6)

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: National Treasures: Rick, Corey and Chum head to Washington DC and the patriotic trio call on some trusted experts to help lay down the law for good deals. (S1, ep 5)

programme.title: Pawn Stars Do America
programme.desc: Emerald City Adventures: Rick, Corey, and Chum hope to find gems in the Emerald City and check out Lego, grunge and Dale Chihuly glass collections along the way. (S1, ep 4)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Ton's Driller Instinct: The guys encounter aggressive outdoorsmen in the wilderness. Later they discover an amphibious ATV and a hammer that can drill through solid rock. (S3, ep 4)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Cold Hard Cash: Ton and Allen go north to Alaska and find two enormous seaplane pontoons and a pair of Smith & Wesson revolvers. (S3, ep 5)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Choo-Choo, Cha-Ching: Ton and Allen get a surprise second chance and uncover a 1960s motorised railroad maintenance car and a pre-WWI Japanese semi-automatic pistol. (S3, ep 6)

programme.title: Auction Hunters
programme.desc: Drumming up Cash: Ton and Allen discover a Zildjian-brand percussion cymbal from the 1940s and a control board designed for large-scale fireworks displays. (S3, ep 7)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Return Of The Mogul's Return: Even a fight with Laura can't keep Dave away from locker auctions in Montclair. Plus, how will Jarrod's hangover affect his bidding? (S7, ep 2)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bunny Owns This Town: Eager not to let Dave distract them, Brandi and Jarrod set their sights on big profits. Ivy finds a treasure that promises adventure on the high seas. (S7, ep 3)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Bowling For Brandi: Darrell and Brandon are thrilled to return to their lucky town of West Covina. However, it's Dave that makes a first-class find. (S7, ep 4)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Deep In The Heart Of Upland: A surprise visitor from Texas shows up in time for a series of heated auctions in Upland, where a bad day for Ivy ends with a big bang. (S7, ep 5)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Daneurysm: Brandi struggles to keep Jarrod focused at abandoned locker auctions in Hemet. Meanwhile, Dan and Laura Dotson find themselves faced with a life or death crisis. (S7, ep 6)

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Education of Miss Profit: Darrell and Brandon discover the sweet taste of success, Mary looks for love and Jarrod and Brandi return to Moreno Valley. (S7, ep 7)

programme.title: Secrets In The Ice
programme.desc: The Giant Penguin Enigma: Mauro De Mauro's disappearance in Italy reveals remains in a Mount Etna cave, linked to mafia ties and a 1962 assassination. (S4, ep 5)

programme.title: The Curse Of Oak Island
programme.desc: Straight as an Arrow: The team is ecstatic when a recent theory about Nolan's Cross comes to fruition while they prepare for a European adventure. (S11, ep 21)

programme.title: New: The Great British Dig

programme.title: Secrets Of The Lost Liners

programme.desc: Nine-Legged Bill. Cap'n Gail's tall tale of a nine-legged octopus in Lake Swoppiton has everyone panicking. But Mojo and Bo wonder: is the story real, or is Cap'n Gail up to something?

programme.title: Stan Can
programme.desc: Dinosaur. The school create a dinosaur to put on display at the museum.

programme.title: Supertato
programme.desc: Turnip of Terror. Supertato and the Veggies are shocked when they meet a turnip in the deli counter.

programme.title: Piripenguins
programme.desc: Big Sister Nugget. Nugget plays big sister to a kid penguin, but her energetic plans prove unpopular.

programme.title: Go Jetters
programme.desc: Mountain Gorillas, The Democratic Republic of the Congo. The Go Jetters race to save a family of mountain gorillas from traps left by hunters.

programme.title: Magic Hands
programme.desc: Twelfth Night. Children's sign language poetry series. Ashley and Aimee go to Greece where they discover Twelfth Night.

programme.title: Vida the Vet
programme.desc: Vida's Tiny Trip. Vida is used to being the vet, but when she hurts her ankle while making house calls, she becomes the patient and all of Sweetwood helps out!

programme.title: Big Lizard
programme.desc: The Camera. Cosima takes over Dad's mission to film a unique underwater plant. But his special camera proves harder to operate than she'd thought, and Big Lizard keeps getting distracted.

programme.title: Bluey
programme.desc: Rug Island. Dad will need to embrace his inner kid if he wants to make Rug Island his home.

programme.title: Nikhil & Jay
programme.desc: Nikhil and Jay and the Compost Monster. Mr Awan tells Nikhil and Jay that there's a monster living in the compost bin who likes to eat weeds! Are they brave enough to feed it?

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran
programme.desc: It's Time for Pottery. Jared has a special plant which needs a pot, so JoJo makes him one in a pottery class. When the pot is knocked onto the floor and breaks, Gran Gran has a plan.

programme.title: Sarah & Duck
programme.desc: Kite Flight. Animation about the adventures of seven-year-old Sarah and her best friend Duck. On a windy day, Sarah and Duck try to get their new kite to fly.

programme.title: Charlie and Lola
programme.desc: I Will Not Ever Never Eat a Tomato. Children's animation series. Lola will not eat tomatoes, mushrooms or peas, so Charlie invents some food facts to make them more appealing.

programme.title: Moon and Me
programme.desc: Humpty Onion. A nursery rhyme book inspires Mr Onion to play at being Humpty Dumpty.

programme.title: BeddyByes
programme.desc: Matching Game. MeMo and BaBa have fun finding and matching shapes all over Planet BeddyByes. MeMo helps BaBa match the shapes in a picture book when they visit their friends, the Yummies.

programme.title: In the Night Garden
programme.desc: Where Did Makka Pakka's Sponge Go? Children's programme. Makka Pakka trips over a stone, and his sponge flies off into Upsy Daisy's megaphone.

programme.title: CBeebies Bedtime Stories
programme.desc: Leah Williamson - Girls Can Do Anything. Leah Williamson shouts loud and proud about girls being able to do anything!

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: After a car mounts the pavement, pedestrians with serious injuries are brought into A&E. Jodie's cut her leg on glass on a night out. And is 61-year-old Crispin having a stroke?

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Big Fat Quiz of Sport

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy panel show as Rob Beckett and Katherine Ryan are joined by guests Gemma Collins, Jordan Stephens, Fin Taylor and Harriet Kemsley.

programme.title: Open House: The Great Sex...

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Can Naked Attraction help clumsy Stephanie, who never gets a second date, and first-time lesbian Bethany find their perfect matches?

programme.title: First Dates

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry Goldberg's Day Off: Inspired by the film Ferris Bueller's Day Off, Barry pretends to be ill so he can avoid school and create an epic day of his own.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Happy Mom, Happy Life: Dana and Adam are given a doll to parent for a class assignment, but Beverly keeps interfering.

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: The One with Nessie: Calvin the over-enthusiastic groom plans a monster Scottish wedding at Loch Ness for him and his bride-to-be, Leanne.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Wine Weekend: The family go on a wine-tasting trip, and Gloria and Mitch are invited to a party at Oprah's house - but they can't bring anyone else.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Royal Visit: When Haley's astrophysicist boyfriend visits, Claire and Phil compete to prove who's smarter. Mitch and Cam go to a yoga retreat.

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube Shorts
programme.desc: A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Barefoot Bob's: Gordon visits Barefoot Bob's beachside restaurant in Massachusetts, where husband and wife Marc and Lisa struggle to attract customers during the winter months.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon revisits Café Hon in Baltimore, Chiarella's in Philadelphia, and Leone's in New Jersey, to find out whether the owners have taken his advice on board.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Greatest Musical Ever Written: Barry makes fun of Adam for taking part in a school musical. Beverly's job as a substitute teacher causes problems for Erica.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Globetrotters: When Adam creates a video that makes it look as though he and his friends beat Barry at basketball, Barry demands a rematch in the gym.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Lake Life: Jay makes the family take their holiday on a houseboat to create memories that will last long after he's gone. And Mitchell runs into an old flame.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Long Goodbye: Phil and Claire realise that Alex is more self-sufficient in college than they thought. Manny is determined to avoid a tearful goodbye when he moves to college.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Olde Hitching Post: Gordon visits the historic Olde Hitching Post restaurant in Massachusetts. Tom bought the business for his daughter but refuses to let her run it.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Levanti's: Gordon visits Pennsylvania, where he meets siblings whose inability to work together is risking their father's life savings at his Italian restaurant, Levanti's.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Boyle-Linetti Wedding: The squad are all given tasks to complete for Gina's mum's wedding to Boyle's dad.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Peralta: Peralta's father, an airline pilot who hasn't played a big part in his life, comes to town. Holt sets the squad an impossible brain teaser.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Co-Dependent's Day: The Simpsons go to California so that Bart and Lisa can tell the Cosmic Wars creator what they think of his latest film.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Wandering Juvie: After Bart scams the town out of wedding presents, he is sent to juvenile detention. But he ends up on the run, chained to a female inmate.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: A Night to Remember: Barry plans romantic gestures for Lainey on prom night, Erica and Geoff try to attend the event together and a nerdy girl asks Adam out.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Dynamic Duo: Barry tries to drive a wedge between Adam and Pops when they discuss a recently released Batman movie. Erica messes up her college interview.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Dear Beloved Family: Gloria rushes Phil to hospital for emergency surgery when he experiences intense stomach pains.

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In Your Head: Luke goes missing after a night out. Can Manny, Phil and Gloria find him? Haley tries to land an interview with the creator of a big lifestyle website.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The Oolong Slayer: Peralta enlists Captain Holt's help while investigating a serial killer. Diaz and Santiago are forced to deal with The Vulture's demands.

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Halloween III: The third instalment of Peralta and Holt's 'Halloween heist' involves a tie-breaking contest to be crowned Amazing Detective Slash Genius.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Burns, Baby Burns: Homer concocts a scam with Mr Burns' long-lost illegitimate son Larry (guest star Rodney Dangerfield).

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart After Dark: Bart gets a job at a burlesque theatre. Several residents are keen customers, but others aren't happy to have the showgirls peddling their wares in Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Brand new series - The Flandshees of Innersimpson: Flanders vows never to speak to Homer again after Homer steals his new headphones. Homer's absolutely delighted - at first...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Judge Me Tender: Moe becomes a judge on American Idol. Meanwhile, Homer spends more time at home, and drives Marge to distraction. Simon Cowell and Ellen DeGeneres guest star.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A retired champion car racer meets a champion ballroom dancer who's looking for a man 'with balls'. And sparks fly when Babestation model Rebecca meets leather-clad Mak.

programme.title: Knives Out
programme.desc: (2019) Sharp, eccentric murder-mystery starring Daniel Craig as a detective anonymously hired to investigate the death of a wealthy writer (Christopher Plummer). With Ana de Armas.

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Thirty-year-old Pablo is HIV positive and wants to break the stigma about his condition. Rapper Leon has been attracting the wrong sort of lady. Can Naked Attraction help?

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Trans woman Amira finally feels happy in her skin and wants a man who's proud to show her off. Rugby player Andy has a soft centre to share with a woman on romantic nights in.

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: A retired champion car racer meets a champion ballroom dancer who's looking for a man 'with balls'. And sparks fly when Babestation model Rebecca meets leather-clad Mak.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Deadheads: Barry's friends reject him for being controlling after chilled rocker Matt starts hanging out with them. Beverly sets up a swear jar.

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: The Lost Boy: Adam gets lost in the Phillies baseball stadium when Murray lets him leave his seat on his own for the first time.

programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: Don't Spook the Bride

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Daddy Issues: Gloria's ex-boyfriend Jorge's resemblance to Manny makes Jay question if he might be Manny's real dad. Phil agonises over getting an anniversary gift for Claire.

programme.desc: Giuseppi's: Gordon Ramsay visits a family-owned Italian in Michigan, run by a father and son who constantly clash. Can he get the restaurant - and the family - back on track?

programme.desc: Handlebar: Gordon Ramsay takes on a time warp at the Handlebar restaurant and lounge in Mount Sinai, New York, where the owners are stuck in the 80s with an unenthusiastic chef.

programme.desc: Sabatiello's: Gordon Ramsay sets his sights on Sabatiello's, an Italian restaurant in Connecticut that's better known for its owner Sammy's tantrums than the food.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Trobiano's: Gordon Ramsay meets struggling executive chef Anthony Trobiano, who's sinking under half a million dollars of debt at his restaurant in Great Neck, New York.

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Whacking Day: Lisa asks singer Barry White to help stop the cruel Springfield 'Whacking Day' tradition of hitting snakes with sticks.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Krusty Gets Cancelled: When Krusty's show gets axed, Bart and Lisa enlist Bette Midler, Hugh Hefner, the Red Hot Chili Peppers and Elizabeth Taylor to help him get it back.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer's Barbershop Quartet: Homer reminisces about the Be Sharps, the barbershop quartet he was in with Barney, Apu and Principal Skinner. Guest starring George Harrison.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer Goes to College: Homer has to go to university to study nuclear physics when it becomes clear that he's unqualified for his job as nuclear power plant safety inspector.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Squirt and the Whale: The Simpsons put up a wind turbine in their back garden. Lisa has an upsetting experience when she attempts to free a beached whale.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: To Surveil with Love: When a bomb squad blows up Homer's unattended gym bag, radiation is released into Springfield, and the authorities react by suspending civil liberties.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The Bob Next Door: Bart becomes convinced that his new neighbour Walt is really his vengeful arch-enemy Sideshow Bob (Kelsey Grammer) in disguise.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Moe Letter Blues: Moe writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are on holiday with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Judge Me Tender: Moe becomes a judge on American Idol. Meanwhile, Homer spends more time at home, and drives Marge to distraction. Simon Cowell and Ellen DeGeneres guest star.

programme.title: Home Alone
programme.desc: (1990) Classic family comedy starring Macaulay Culkin. A boy's parents forget to take him on holiday with them. Then two inept burglars turn up. Can our resourceful young hero outwit them?

programme.desc: What do Britain's finest sofa critics think of You Bet!, Black Doves, Jamie Cooks Christmas, Wolf Hall: The Mirror and the Light, and Swiped: The School That Banned Smartphones?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Bev dates Howard, a former bank manager with a famous face. And Anthony, who has a wild past, meets Lawrence, who's never been in love and thinks his 'dating river has run dry'.

programme.desc: Come Fly with Me: Jay reluctantly takes Phil out to fly his new model plane, but a manoeuvre goes awry...

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Mother!: When Dede drops in unexpectedly, Mitchell and Cam realise the effect she has on their lives. Phil, Luke, Alex and Haley all have different bad news to break to Claire.

programme.desc: The Escape: Haley meets Arvin's parents, but when things don't go as planned, fate leads to an unexpected reunion with all her ex-boyfriends.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Jack's Waterfront: In Michigan, Gordon Ramsay visits a lakeside restaurant in a summer hotspot, where the food fails to match the fantastic views. Can Gordon turn the tide?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The Black Pearl: A struggling seafood restaurant in Manhattan, The Black Pearl, is hampered by debts, kitchen problems and three owners who all want to run things their way.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: J Willy's Bar & Grille: Gordon's got his work cut out at J Willy's in Indiana - most of the food is from a can or the freezer, and they're a million dollars in debt.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Rosebud: He may be obscenely rich, but Mr Burns can never be truly happy without his childhood teddy bear, Bobo, who Bart finds in a bag of ice and gives to Maggie.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Treehouse of Horror IV: Homer sells his soul to the devil for a donut, no one believes Bart can see an evil goblin, and Mr Burns invites the Simpsons for tea at a spooky castle.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge on the Lam: Marge and her new friend Ruth Powers set off on a Thelma and Louise-style adventure, with Chief Wiggum and Homer in hot pursuit...

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart's Inner Child: Self-help guru Brad Goodman encourages the population of Springfield to act more like Bart, with disastrous consequences. Guest starring James Brown.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.

programme.title: S.W.A.T.
programme.desc: (2003) Action with Colin Farrell and Samuel L Jackson. A loose canon joins an elite force to escort a fugitive to chokey. But the baddie's put a reward out for help with his escape.

programme.title: xXx: The Next Level
programme.desc: (2005) Action thriller sequel with Samuel L Jackson, Ice Cube and Willem Dafoe. There's a new Triple X agent in town and he's up against some shady government business.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Destroyer
programme.desc: (1943) Second World War drama about a warship assigned to mail runs but that ends up engaged in battle anyway, starring Edward G Robinson, Glenn Ford and Marguerite Chapman.

programme.title: The Devil at 4 O'Clock
programme.desc: (1961) Drama. Spencer Tracy stars as an unfairly unpopular priest living on a volcanic South Sea island which is about to erupt. With Kerwin Matthews, Frank Sinatra and Barbara Luna.

programme.title: Midway
programme.desc: (2019) Roland Emmerich's sprawling, action-packed war drama about the Battle of Midway, a major turning point in World War II. Starring Ed Skrein, Luke Evans and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Hidden Figures
programme.desc: (2016) Taraji P. Henson, Octavia Spencer and Janelle Monáe star in the Oscar-nominated, fact-based drama about three women whose genius made a significant contribution to the space race.

programme.title: Bohemian Rhapsody
programme.desc: (2018) Rami Malek turns in an Oscar-winning performance as Freddie Mercury in this rollercoaster musical biopic of the late Queen frontman. Big tunes. Big drama. Bigger teeth.

programme.title: Benedetta
programme.desc: (2021) Paul Verhoeven's historical drama. Sex and the sacred collide as a Renaissance nun begins to have visions of Christ, while also taking a shine to one of her sisters. In French/subs.

programme.title: In Fear
programme.desc: (2013) Psychological horror with Iain De Caestecker and Alice Englert. A couple get lost in remote rural lanes as they drive to a music festival. Frustration turns to fear as dusk falls...

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Lifeboat
programme.desc: (1944) Alfred Hitchcock's Oscar-nominated Second World War drama starring Tallulah Bankhead, William Bendix and Walter Slezak as three of the survivors from a liner torpedoed by the Nazis.

programme.title: Monster House
programme.desc: (2006) Spooky animated caper with Maggie Gyllenhaal and Steve Buscemi. A young boy and his babysitter spy on the creepy neighbour. Did he really eat his wife?

programme.title: Stormbreaker
programme.desc: (2006) Family action-thriller with Alex Pettyfer and Mickey Rourke. British intelligence recruit a schoolboy to take on the man who killed his dad and is planning to unleash a deadly virus.

programme.title: The Personal History of David...
programme.desc: ...Copperfield: (2019) Armando Iannucci's critically acclaimed comedy-drama reinvention of the classic Charles Dickens novel, starring Dev Patel, Tilda Swinton and Hugh Laurie.

programme.title: Fisherman's Friends
programme.desc: (2019) Heart-warming comedy based on the real-life story of the Cornish folk ensemble who took the UK charts by storm in 2010, starring Daniel Mays and Tuppence Middleton.

programme.title: The Other Woman
programme.desc: (2014) Romcom starring Cameron Diaz, Leslie Mann, Kate Upton and Nikolaj Coster-Waldau. Three women take revenge on the man who betrayed their love. Strong language, scenes that may offend.

programme.title: The Fury
programme.desc: (1978) Brian De Palma's supernatural horror with Kirk Douglas, John Cassavetes, Andrew Stevens and Amy Irving. A shadowy agency abducts a young man with telekinetic powers.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: (2019) Oscar-nominated psychological horror starring Willem Dafoe and Robert Pattinson. A pair of lighthouse keepers dangerously descend into insanity on a remote island.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Animal Farm
programme.desc: (1954) George Orwell's cautionary tale reimagined in cartoon form. A farm's animals revolt against their abusive owner only for the pigs to become drunk with their newly found power.

programme.title: Arabesque
programme.desc: (1966) Gregory Peck stars in Stanley Donen's spy thiller. An Oxford professor is unwittingly drawn into a deadly web of political intrigue. With Sophia Loren and Alan Badel.

programme.title: Think Like a Dog
programme.desc: (2020) Cheeky comedy with Megan Fox. A young science prodigy (Gabriel Bateman) invents a piece of tech that lets him and his pet dog communicate with each other telepathically.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: (1990) Action comedy with Arnold Schwarzenegger. A tough cop goes undercover as a kindergarten teacher. Tough? Ha! The kids'll take him down in no time.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: (2013) Sci-fi action-mystery set on a war-ravaged planet Earth that's been largely abandoned by humanity. With Tom Cruise, Andrea Riseborough, Olga Kurylenko and Morgan Freeman.

programme.title: Kingsman: The Golden Circle
programme.desc: (2017) Taron Egerton returns as the newest recruit to the stylish secret agency Kingsman for more ass-kicking comedy action. A star-studded cast includes Julianne Moore and Elton John.

programme.title: Monster Hunter
programme.desc: (2020) Paul WS Anderson's sci-fi action starring Milla Jovovich, based on the game of the same name. A US Army Ranger must fight her way out of a parallel world full of monsters.

programme.title: The Pope's Exorcist
programme.desc: (2023) Supernatural horror starring Russell Crowe, loosely based on the memoirs of a 'real' exorcist. A case of demonic possession in Spain connects to dark secrets from the Inquisition.
